channel.title: Press Freedom on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Press Freedom on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Progress Report & Rumour Mill — March 2026
item.description: Tracking the nation's promises, projects, and entirely fictional rumours.

item.title: Tuesday's Guyana Brief — Budget Debate Opens With Animal Noises, Speaker Locks Out Press, and President Flies to Belize to Tell Them How Great Guyana Is
item.description: The 2026 budget debate opened with heckling and bizarre animal noises, Speaker Nadir brought back COVID rules to limit journalists to five, Ali told Belize to follow Guyana’s lead on food security, WIN and APNU both trashed the budget for different reasons, and a beloved Rupununi tour guide was murdered over cattle rustling.
